creator: alan_1912@yahoo.com
text:
Repeatable crash when using USB drivers if_zyd or if_rum.
Crash occurs in:
0xc06d2fd5 in usb_transfer_complete (xfer=0x0)
    at /usr/src/sys/dev/usb/usbdi.c:977

How-To-Repeat: Use either a Zydas or a Ralink 2501 based USB wireless.
Put some light load on the network (wget a file).
Panic will occur in a minute or two.
